name: Get Setters for National Campaign Leads

content.query:
SELECT distinct
ils.Division
,prd.LongDescription as Product
,srs.LeadSubSource
,app.LP_AppointmentID
,emp.LP_EmployeeID as SetBy_LP_EmployeeID
,emp.FirstName as SetBy_FirstName
,emp.LastName as SetBy_LastName
,emp.FirstName +' '+ emp.LastName as SetBy_FullName
,emp.Active as SetBy_Active
,lds.LP_CustomerID as ProspectID
,lds.LP_LeadID as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,app.SetDate
,ils.ApptDate
FROM
EDW.FACT_ISSUED_LEAD ils
,EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT app
,EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE emp
,EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
,EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
where 
ils.AppointmentID = app.AppointmentID
and ils.LeadID = lds.LeadID
and app.SetBy = emp.EmployeeID
and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and app.SetDate between '2023-05-01' and '2023-05-31'
and prd.LongDescription not in ('Concrete Coatings','Garage Org', 'Garage Organization')
and lds.LeadSubSourceID in
(
'FHI-1319',
'FHI-954',
'FHI-1323',
'HSI-4897',
'HSI-4839',
'HSI-2299',
'HSI-4902',
'MAC-2666',
'MAC-2717',
'MAC-2495',
'MXH-6000',
'MXH-5950',
'MXH-5951',
'MXH-6024',
'PBC-859',
'PBC-128',
'PBC-873',
'PHI-513',
'PHI-291',
'PHI-525',
'RTW-1703',
'RTW-1492',
'RTW-1720',
'SWR-3033',
'SWR-2823',
'SWR-3142'
)
order by 
ils.Division
,prd.LongDescription
,srs.LeadSubSource
,emp.LP_EmployeeID
